title: Reading Comprehension and Everyday English Practice Test

questions.questionText: What do we say when we meet someone in the morning?
questions.explanation: We say Good morning when we meet someone in the morning.

questions.questionText: What do we say when someone helps us?
questions.explanation: We say Thank you when someone helps us.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we need something politely?
questions.explanation: We say Please when we ask for something politely.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we make a mistake?
questions.explanation: We say Sorry when we make a mistake.

questions.questionText: Read: 'The dog ran fast.' What did the dog do?
questions.explanation: The sentence says the dog ran fast.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we leave someone?
questions.explanation: We say Goodbye when we leave.

questions.questionText: Read: 'Riya has a red ball.' What color is the ball?
questions.explanation: The sentence says the ball is red.

questions.questionText: What do we say when someone sneezes?
questions.explanation: We say Bless you when someone sneezes.

questions.questionText: Read: 'Birds live in nests.' Where do birds live?
questions.explanation: The sentence says birds live in nests.

questions.questionText: What do we say to welcome a guest?
questions.explanation: We say Welcome to make a guest feel at home.

questions.questionText: Read: 'The cat sat on the mat.' Where did the cat sit?
questions.explanation: The sentence says the cat sat on the mat.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we want to know someone's name?
questions.explanation: What is your name? asks for someone's name.

questions.questionText: Read: 'Apples are fruits.' What are apples?
questions.explanation: The sentence says apples are fruits.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we agree?
questions.explanation: Yes shows agreement. We use it when we agree with someone.

questions.questionText: Read: 'The sun gives us light.' What does the sun give?
questions.explanation: The sentence says the sun gives us light.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we don't understand?
questions.explanation: We say I don't understand when we need help.

questions.questionText: Read: 'Fish live in water.' Where do fish live?
questions.explanation: The sentence says fish live in water.

questions.questionText: What do we say when someone does well?
questions.explanation: We say Well done to praise someone.

questions.questionText: Read: 'We need water to live.' Why do we need water?
questions.explanation: The sentence says we need water to live.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we want to pass?
questions.explanation: We say Excuse me when we want to pass politely.

questions.questionText: Read: 'Plants need sunlight to grow.' What do plants need?
questions.explanation: The sentence says plants need sunlight to grow.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we meet someone for the first time?
questions.explanation: We say Nice to meet you when we meet someone first.

questions.questionText: Read: 'The teacher teaches in a school.' Who teaches?
questions.explanation: The sentence says the teacher teaches.

questions.questionText: What do we say when we want to know the time?
questions.explanation: What time is it? asks for the current time.

questions.questionText: Read: 'Books help us learn.' What do books help us do?
questions.explanation: The sentence says books help us learn.
